mapper.select: select s.id, s.avatar, s.student_name, s.institution_id, ps.relation, s.birth, s.school, s.address, s.sex, s.create_time, s.update_time from parent_student ps left join student s on s.id = ps.student_id where ps.parent_id = #{dto.parentId}

select s.*, ps.relation, cr.course_total_time, cr.course_rest_time, p.phone from class_student as cs left join student s on s.id = cs.student_id left join course_record as cr on cr.student_id = s.id left join parent_student as ps on ps.student_id = s.id and ps.is_primary = true left join parent p on ps.parent_id = p.id where cs.class_id = #{dto.classId}
